ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-10-2024 Continued To Aug-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Howard Kane appeared by zoom for Adrianne Shroyer (petitioner).

The court stated that it saw the declaration that was filed yesterday and informed Mr. Kane that he still needs to file a new petition for final distribution. Status on close of estate is continued to August 7, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-29-2024 Continued To Jul-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Howard Kane appeared by zoom for administrator.

Mr. Kane requested a continuance stating that the estate is in a position to be closed, that he needs to clear up some remaining issues in the probate examiner's notes and that he thinks he can get it finalized by the next hearing. Status on close of estate is continued to July 10, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Roger T. Picquet. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-09-2024 Continued To May-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-20-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Howard Kane, Esq., for Adrienne Shroyer, Administrator.

At the outset, the court reminds counsel that the instant petition has been pending for almost one (1) year now. Counsel offers a report on the status of the estate. The court acknowledges counsel's oral report and advises that it intends to take the petition off calendar and set a new status date. No objection to the preceding is presented.

The Petition for Final Distribution is off calendar. A new status hearing on close of estate is set for Apr-09-2024 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file a petition to approve status of administration prior to the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (759 Sweeney St, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Jun-09-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Howard Kane, via Zoom, for and with Adrianne Shroyer, Personal Representative.

The sale was confirmed at $1,020,050 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-19-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing On Filing Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Continued To Jan-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-12-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Adrianne Shroyer, via ZOOM, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court begins by querying counsel if she's ever administered an estate. Ms. Shroyer reports that she has not but advises that she intends to hire an attorney if the court grants her petition. The court then confirms with Ms. Shroyer that she intends to sell the real property and that it is currently vacant. The court then advises Ms. Shroyer of its intent to grant the petition providing her limited authority with a minimum bond, the appointment of Karen Ann Simons as probate referee and the setting of the following status dates: Filing of Final Inventory and Appraisal for 12/06/21 and Status on Close of Estate for 08/01/22.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Letters of Administration is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.
